sutta: monks this holy life is not lived to cheat or cajole people it is not concerned with getting gain profit on authority it is not concerned with the flood of gossip nor with the idea of let folks know me as so and so no monks this holy life is lived for the sake of self-restraint for the sake of abandoning for the sake of detachment from the passions for the sake of making to cease this is 1 of those utahs that concern more that's concerned with monks more and here the buddha is trying to say that the main purpose of the holy life is to end this round of rebirths to end our suffering to cut off the ego but then once a person becomes a manga there are many distractions not if he's not careful either he can become corrupt and indulge in akusala unskillful actions like not keeping the precepts etc or getting caught up with fame his name and fame or sometimes he might get involved with with work which is concerned with uh with among for example uh trying to propagate the dhamma trying to teach trying to teach meditation and writing books and get caught up with funerals chanting etc but if he does too much of these things he can become distracted now from the main task or the main aim of the holy life which is to cultivate ourselves and to to let go and to end our suffering so these 2 ties more for the for the monks now the next utah is
